items.name: AMC Charges (Annual Maintenance Charges)
items.description: The AMC is valid for 1 year from the date of payment. Only service is provided during the AMC period. Spares if any are defective, will be charged Extra. Additional Wiring, Camera Position change, Monitor, UPS, adding additional devices etc are not included in AMC. 100% AMC amount should be paid in advance. No service on Sundays and other holidays. No liability for Loss of data due to HDD failure and internet network failure
